## Free Initial Consultation

I am open to a free initial consultation for suitable CFO review, project FS modeling, investment analysis, M&A screening, and department workflow automation problems.

Please keep this public issue safe. Do not post private records, client names, organization names, private figures, access material, or private attachments.

## Inquiry Type

CFO review / Project FS modeling / Investment analysis / M&A screening / Department automation / Other:

## Public-Safe Context

Describe the type of problem without naming clients, projects, organizations, counterparties, or private figures.

## Desired Outcome

What would a useful first output look like?

Examples:

- financial review note
- project FS model structure
- investment review memo outline
- M&A screening checklist
- department automation workflow
- data room readiness checklist

## Current Workflow Pain

What is currently slow, unclear, repetitive, or risky?

## Confidentiality Confirmation

- [ ] This inquiry does not include live project records.
- [ ] This inquiry does not include private organization information.
- [ ] This inquiry does not include client names.
- [ ] This inquiry does not include private figures, access material, or private attachments.
- [ ] This inquiry is suitable for a public discussion.
